title: StockBridge(RefinedStrotage+Create)
description: Connect Create automation to Refined Storage 2. One block exposes your entire RS network as an inventory for depots, funnels, and mechanical arms.
body:
Bridge Create mechanical automation and Refined Storage 2.

StockBridge adds a Network Interface block that connects to your Refined Storage network and exposes it as a standard inventory. Create depots, funnels, belts, and mechanical arms can insert and extract items directly — no chest buffer required.

How it works

Craft and place a Network Interface

Connect RS cables on any side

Attach Create automation (depot, funnel, mechanical arm, etc.)

Items flow between your RS network and Create contraptions automatically

Features

Single-block bridge between RS and Create

Works with any mod that uses standard item handlers (hoppers, pipes, etc.)

Configurable energy consumption (FE/t) in config

Jade tooltips show network status (optional)

JEI crafting recipe included

Versions

Minecraft 1.21.1

NeoForge

Refined Storage 2.0.0+ (required)

Optional but recommended: Create, Jade, JEI

If you find bugs or have ideas for improvements, feel free to leave a comment!

Also available on CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stockbridge-refinedstrotage-create/files
